input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests cover SecurityManager and deep reflective/module-access behavior; on newer JDKs such as JDK 25 failures are more likely to require test/code adaptation or selective coverage changes than deterministic setup.
OGNL exposes optional system properties such as ognl.UseJDK9PlusAccessHandler and ognl.security.manager, but research did not show they are required before meaningful generated coverage is reachable.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process Java expression language. The 3.3.5 artifact declares its needed runtime dependency on Javassist transitively, and basic parse/get/set coverage works without external services, Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or required system properties.
